'''Rancor squad''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] military unit consisting of seven elite [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]. They had orders to retrieve an unknown object after the [[Battle of Taul|Battle]] of [[Taul/Legends|Taul]]. They participated in the subsequent [[skirmish on Taul]], and the members of the squad were armed with [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]] and [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblades]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|Return to Taul}}
